description: Mixed batch: 2 AUTO_HEAL + 1 LOGIC_BUG (ISSUE_ONLY) → only 2 fixers dispatched; LOGIC_BUG Issue stays open with no fix attempt.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: T2B reads recommended_action from analyzer; ISSUE_ONLY → no fixer dispatch
rubric_hints.output_structure: fixes_applied=2 NOT 3; issue_only_count=1 reflects the LOGIC_BUG that stayed unfixed
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: Auto-fix matrix per spec §3.6 honored: LOGIC_BUG never auto-heals
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: LOGIC_BUG Issue created but no fixer commit lands; Issue stays open
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Mixed batch is normal (not error); TRIAGE_COMPLETE result
